title: rubus projectus
intro: Rubus projectus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or mountain raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus projectus include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be used to make jams and preserves due to its sweet-tart flavor.
